description: The grill (execution-epic-grill) spawns a long-lived, named PRD drafter when the FIRST grill question is answered; each subsequent answer is fed to it live (appended to grill-decisions.log and signalled). The drafter continuously rewrites .excn/runtime/prd-draft.json (write-temp-then-rename), reading the Grounding Pack plus the live decisions log, and writes ONLY under .excn/runtime/ — never the authoritative .excn/prds/ or .excn/adr/. Skill-level work: the spawn+feed integration lives in execution-epic-grill.
title: Checkpoint-respawned background drafter overwrites the speculative PRD draft
acceptance_criteria: execution-epic-grill spawns a named long-lived drafter when the first question is answered (not at a phase boundary, not at grill end)
Each subsequent answer is fed to the drafter live: the decisions log is appended per answer and the drafter is signalled to re-draft
The drafter continuously rewrites .excn/runtime/prd-draft.json via temp-file-then-rename (atomic, G4); no torn/partial draft is left behind
The drafter writes ONLY under .excn/runtime/ — never .excn/prds/ or .excn/adr/; the channel guard is never on its path and is not modified
Src-First: the execution-epic-grill skill change is byte-identical between src/template and the root mirror
